meta.title: Determination of the Molecular Weight of Bovine Enterovirus RNA by Nuclease Digestion

abstractHtml: The mol. wt. of a [32P]-labelled bovine enterovirus RNA has been determined by digesting with pancreatic RNase and separating the resulting oligonucleotides using a two-stage fractionation method on DEAE-Sephadex in 7 M-urea at pH 7.6 and pH 3.0. We have estimated the number of nucleotides as 8612 ± 55. This corresponds to a mol. wt. of 2.93 ± 0.02 x 106 which is in agreement with estimates obtained by sedimentation and gel electrophoresis techniques.
